metadata.description: Autonomous software-engineering loop — role-separated PM planning + faithful board execution, orchestrating gh-roadmap and proven skills.

plugins.name: ultraloop
plugins.description: Two skills sharing one engine: ultraloop:pm (plan -> write the board) and ultraloop:loop (read the board -> TDD + pre-merge E2E -> ship, logging progress to the board). Orchestrates gh-roadmap (board structure/setup authority) + proven planning/spec/TDD/E2E skills instead of reimplementing them. Board is the single source of truth; roles and permissions are fully separated.
